description_long: This is an open hardcover book resting flat, with its pages spread to reveal both text and a scientific diagram. The left page features a colorful illustration of atomic or planetary orbits, with several spheres connected by lines, while the right page contains dense blocks of printed text. The book's cover is a medium brown, resembling wood or leather, and the pages are a light beige with a slight sheen. The book appears moderately thick, with a visible central crease where the pages meet the spine. The overall appearance suggests it is a textbook or reference book, possibly used for study or research in an urban environment such as a park bench, sidewalk café, or public library.
description: An open hardcover book with a brown cover, showing a scientific diagram and text on its cream-colored pages.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open book with both pages visible, including a diagram on the left and text on the right.
description_view_1: Side view showing the book's thickness and the curvature of the open pages, with the spine at the back.
description_view_2: Rear view of the open book, with the diagram now on the right and text on the left, highlighting the book's symmetrical spread.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the diagram page, with the book's thickness and page curvature visible.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover displays a scientific diagram featuring several colored spheres connected by curved lines, resembling atomic or planetary orbits. The illustration is simple and schematic, with a focus on geometric shapes and muted colors.
